title: Boy Why You So Ears
description: Gives the spotted wolf variant some big ol ears, like its real-life counterpart
body:
## !!! Requires Optifine or EMF+ETF !!!

Spotted wolves look a little more like painted wild dogs now! This resource pack should work in any version after wolf variants were added (1.20.5+)

Fresh Animations compatibility pack here!!! VVV
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-boy-why-you-so-ears
Shoutout to Dasawkem for making it!!
